decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to control the game by countering opponent's spells, bouncing their permanents, and drawing cards to maintain card advantage. The deck utilizes a mix of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to control the tempo of the game. The win condition is to establish board control with efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Namor the Sub-Mariner, while also having burn spells like Burst Lightning and Roaring Furnace/Steaming Sauna to finish off the opponent. The mana base is built to support the deck's color requirements and ensure consistency in casting spells.

The deck focuses on controlling the board and resources of the opponent using a combination of spells and land cards. By combining powerful control spells like Day of Judgment and Negate with land cards that provide various benefits, the deck aims to control the game tempo and limit the opponent's options. Tablet of Discovery and Consult the Star Charts help dig for key cards, while Jeskai Revelation provides card draw and life gain. Overall, the deck is designed to outlast opponents through resource management and strategic spell usage.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a quick and aggressive strategy by playing low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker early on, supported by efficient combat tricks like Practiced Offense and Seam Rip. The deck also utilizes powerful finishers such as Brightglass Gearhulk and Surrak, Elusive Hunter to secure the win. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Gene Pollinator and Keen-Eyed Curator to maintain card advantage and tempo throughout the game. With a focus on aggression and efficiency, this Selesnya Aggro deck aims to quickly outpace and overrun the opponent.

This deck focuses on using a combination of reanimation spells and powerful creatures to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Restless Reef and Deceit to dump creatures in the graveyard, players can then use spells like Requiting Hex and Doomsday Excruciator to bring them back into play. The deck also includes control elements, such as Duress and Deadly Cover-Up, to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Ultimately, the goal is to establish a powerful board presence and quickly close out the game with high-impact creatures like Superior Spider-Man.

The main concept of this deck is to maintain a fast and aggressive playstyle by casting low-cost spells and utilizing creatures with evasion abilities. The deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent by quickly developing the board and dealing direct damage efficiently. The inclusion of bounce spells and counter magic helps control the opponent's threats while also protecting the deck's own creatures. Overall, the deck focuses on dealing damage quickly and efficiently, while maintaining versatility and adaptability through the use of various spells and creature abilities.

This Jeskai Control deck focuses on controlling the board through a combination of removal spells and artifact manipulation. The key strategy is to use cards like Cryogen Relic and Legion Extruder to slow down the opponent's game plan, while using cards like Day of Judgment and United Battlefront to clear the board when necessary. The deck also utilizes powerful artifacts like Pinnacle Starcage and Weapons Manufacturing to generate value and gain card advantage. By effectively managing resources and disrupting the opponent's strategy, this deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver its opponents in a long game.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on building a board presence quickly with low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, and using powerful cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker to overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Practiced Offense and Surrak, Elusive Hunter to deal damage efficiently and efficiently punish the opponent for not being able to keep up with the fast-paced aggression. The deck's strategy is to apply constant pressure and force the opponent to react while maintaining momentum through efficient card choices.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of creatures and combat tricks. It aims to play aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker, while using cards like Spider Manifestation and Brightglass Gearhulk to maintain board presence. Practiced Offense and Seam Rip provide additional damage and removal options. The deck also includes cards like Abandoned Air Temple and Hushwood Verge to ensure mana consistency, allowing the player to maximize their early game aggression and push for a quick victory.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a combination of removal spells, board wipes, and card advantage to dominate the battlefield. By utilizing a mix of versatile removal and counterspells, along with powerful draw spells like "Jeskai Revelation" and "Consult the Star Charts", the deck aims to outvalue opponents and disrupt their game plan. The deck also includes a variety of land cards to ensure consistent mana production and smooth gameplay. Overall, the key strategy of this deck is to maintain control of the board while drawing into powerful spells to secure victory.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells to out-value and outlast the opponent. By utilizing cards like Stock Up, Jeskai Revelation, and Accumulate Wisdom to draw more cards and generate card advantage, as well as cards like Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson to remove threats from the board, the deck aims to control the game until it can secure a win condition. Additionally, cards like Iroh's Demonstration and Abandon Attachments provide additional value and utility to the deck's strategy.

The key concept of this UR Aggro deck is to maintain control of the board by using cheap spells and creatures to constantly pressure the opponent while also disrupting their game plan with bounce spells and counters. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and tempo plays, using cards like Boomerang Basics and Burst Lightning to deal damage efficiently. The deck also utilizes card draw and manipulation to ensure consistency and to find key cards like Stormchaser's Talent and Slickshot Show-Off to close out the game quickly.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of spells and abilities to outmaneuver opponents. The deck includes card draw options, removal spells, and counter spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By managing resources effectively and making strategic decisions, this Izzet Control deck aims to achieve board dominance and ultimately come out victorious in the match. The deck also includes cards that provide additional card advantage and ways to generate value in the mid to late game.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on using a variety of spells and abilities to control the game and out value the opponent. By drawing extra cards, countering spells, burning creatures, and generating mana advantage, the deck aims to stay ahead on resources and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes a few key creatures and lands to provide additional utility and support. Overall, the deck aims to control the game's pace and outcome through efficient use of spells and strategic decision-making.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a quick and aggressive pace using powerful green creatures and enhancing them with various buffs and support cards. The deck includes cards that provide additional creatures, pump up existing ones, and accelerate mana production to quickly deploy threats. The strategy revolves around building a strong board presence early on and leveraging it to deal massive damage before the opponent can respond effectively. The deck aims to maintain high pressure throughout the game and close out matches swiftly.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of graveyard manipulation and powerful creatures to overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Winternight Stories, Doomsday Excruciator, and Requiting Hex, the deck can quickly fill the graveyard and then bring back strong creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Emeritus of Ideation. Supporting cards like Duress and Strategic Betrayal help disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Hidden Lair and Deadly Cover-Up provide protection for your own creatures. Overall, the deck aims to set up a powerful board state and quickly close out the game.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures while utilizing cards that provide support and flexibility. By combining cards that generate creatures quickly, such as Badgermole Cub and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker, with powerful creatures like Brightglass Gearhulk and Surrak, Elusive Hunter, the deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence. Support cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Temple Garden help to protect and boost the creatures, allowing for efficient attacks. Additionally, cards like Multiversal Passage and Seam Rip provide additional versatility and utility to control the pace of the game.
